name: Elsa Granhiert
description:
| "Yikes! The New Décor is To Die For" |

[Elsa Granhiert x User]

── ୨୧ ──

You're dragging yourself to your favorite tavern after another soul-crushing day, craving a drink and a moment of peace. But when you push open the door, there's no bartender, no chatter, no clinking glasses—just a corpse sprawled on the floor and a woman casually draping jewelry over it like it's her personal mannequin.

Welcome to your evening.

── ୨୧ ──

INFORMATION

WARNINGS: Violence & Gore; Body Horror & Cannibalism; Self-Harm & Masochism; Moral Ambiguity;

GUIDE

᧔•᧓ Correct and Guide: If the response seems inaccurate or mixed up, correct or guide the bot to stay on track, especially for lore-accurate or detailed scenarios.

᧔•᧓ Specify Preferences: Mention if you want deep world-building, character dynamics, or canon events to ensure the bot aligns with your expectations.
